examples.title: Viewing Transformation Matrix Generation
examples.description: Algorithm to generate the viewing transformation matrix from VRP, VPN, and VUP
examples.explanation: The viewing transformation converts world coordinates to camera-relative coordinates by translating the VRP to origin and rotating to align the viewing direction with the -Z axis.

examples.title: Perspective Projection Matrix
examples.description: Generates the perspective projection matrix with near and far planes
examples.explanation: The perspective matrix transforms coordinates such that x' = x/z and y' = y/z, creating the depth effect where objects appear smaller with distance.

examples.title: Window to Viewport Transformation
examples.description: Maps coordinates from world window to screen viewport
examples.explanation: This transformation scales and translates world coordinates to screen positions, maintaining the relative position within the window.
